infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: Notifications help you receive new matches and messages.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera permission is required to capture verification selfies and make video calls.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone permission is required to connect your voice and video calls.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Vela uses your location to find nearby matches and show approximate distances.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Vela requires access to your photo library to select and upload profile pictures.
